figure_contract.core_conclusion: The frozen Task 3 energy is not a controlled solution of its own pole equation.

evidence_chain.a: Tasks 1 and 2 have reproducible benchmark arithmetic.
evidence_chain.b: The frozen energy misses the stated pole condition on the real axis.
evidence_chain.c: The result depends strongly on approximation and has order-one width.

note: Benchmark diagnostic only; the source Figure 3 is a schematic without a quantitative parameter contract.
